subject: COMP 3420 — Final Project Submission Reminder
snippet: Hi everyone, just a reminder that your final project is due this Friday, March 27th by 11:59 PM. Please subm
body:
Hi everyone,

Just a reminder that your final project is due this Friday, March 27th by 11:59 PM. Please submit a ZIP file containing your source code, a README, and your written report to the course portal.

Late submissions will be penalized 10% per day. If you are experiencing technical difficulties, email me before the deadline — not after.

Good luck,
Prof. Marsh

subject: Advising Appointment Confirmation — Thursday 2:00 PM
snippet: Hi Hunter, this is a confirmation of your academic advising appointment on Thursday, March 26th at 2:00 PM in
body:
Hi Hunter,

This is a confirmation of your academic advising appointment on Thursday, March 26th at 2:00 PM in my office, Burnside Hall Room 512.

We'll be reviewing your course selection for next semester and discussing your progress toward your degree requirements. Please bring a printed copy of your unofficial transcript.

See you then,
Dr. Osei
Academic Advisor, Department of Computer Science

subject: Action Required: Course Registration Opens March 30
snippet: Dear Hunter, course registration for the Fall 2026 semester opens on Monday, March 30th at 8:00 AM. Your reg
body:
Dear Hunter,

Course registration for the Fall 2026 semester opens on Monday, March 30th at 8:00 AM. Your registration time slot is 8:00 AM — you are in the first group.

Please log in to the Student Portal and prepare your course selections in advance. Popular courses fill up quickly. Make sure any holds on your account are cleared before your registration window opens.

For questions, contact the Registrar's Office at registrar@university.edu.

Regards,
Registrar's Office

subject: Study session tonight? — MATH 2150 midterm
snippet: Hey Hunter, a few of us are meeting in the library tonight at 7pm to go over the practice problems for the M
body:
Hey Hunter,

A few of us are meeting in the library tonight at 7:00 PM to go over the practice problems for the MATH 2150 midterm tomorrow. We'll be in the group study room on the 3rd floor (Room 302).

We're planning to work through chapters 6–9 and go over last year's exam. Let me know if you can make it!

Alex

subject: 50% off your next order — tonight only!
snippet: Use code SAVE50 at checkout. Order now and get half off your next Domino's order. Limited time offer!
body: Use code SAVE50 at checkout. Order now and get half off your next Domino's order. Limited time offer! Order online at dominos.ca.

subject: Urgent: Bursary Application Deadline — April 1
snippet: Dear Hunter, this is a reminder that the deadline to submit your bursary application for the upcoming semeste
body:
Dear Hunter,

This is a reminder that the deadline to submit your bursary application for the upcoming semester is March 31st, 2026. Applications submitted after this date will not be considered.

To apply, log in to the Student Financial Aid Portal and complete the bursary application form. You will need to upload proof of enrollment and a brief personal statement.

If you have already submitted your application, no further action is required.

For assistance, contact our office at finaid@university.edu or call 514-555-0192.

Sincerely,
Financial Aid Office
